hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *eval/golden_dataset.jsonl) [ -f eval/.dataset-frozen ] && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"eval/golden_dataset.jsonl is FROZEN (CLAUDE.md non-negotiable #1). Changes require written approval from the human owner, recorded in the active plans/phase-N-plan.md. Remove eval/.dataset-frozen only with that approval."}}' ;; esac; exit 0; }
